zh.Low Torry, Fife, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭費伏勒夫 托利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian de Valognes於1370年出生在蘇格蘭費伏托利本時，她的父親James de Valognes16歲，母親Elizabeth de Lindsay18歲。她於1388年與Andrew Wardlaw在英國蘇格蘭費伏勒夫 托利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1424年在英國蘇格蘭費伏勒夫 托利享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian de Valognes was born in 1370, in Torryburn, Fife, Scotland, her father, James de Valognes, was 16 and her mother, Elizabeth de Lindsay, was 18. She married Andrew Wardlaw in 1388, in Low Torry, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1424, in Low Torry, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian de Valognes est née en 1370, à Torryburn, Fife, Écosse, son père, James de Valognes, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Lindsay, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Andrew Wardlaw en 1388, à Low Torry, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1424, à Low Torry, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Christian de Valognes(이)가 1370년 스컷랜드 피프 토리번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James de Valognes(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Lindsay(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1388년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 로 토리에서 Andrew Wardlaw(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1424년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 로 토리에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian de Valognes родилась в 1370 г. в местности торрибурн, фиф, Шотландия, её отцу по имени James de Valognes было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Lindsay, 18.
